args: $line = Get-Content 'services/ai/.env' | Where-Object { $_ -match '^SP_ACCESS_TOKEN=' } | Select-Object -First 1; if (-not $line) { throw 'SP_ACCESS_TOKEN is missing from services/ai/.env' }; $env:SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN = ($line -replace '^SP_ACCESS_TOKEN=', '').Trim().Trim('"'); & npx -y @supabase/mcp-server-supabase@latest --project-ref=protxmboekwtzxpwmplt
